main_gate.name: Vignan Main Gate
main_gate.description: Primary South-East entry point for Mahotsav registrations.
navigation: Located at the South-East end of the campus main road.

library.name: NTR Library
library.description: A quiet zone converted into a performance area for Literature and Dance events during Mahotsav.
navigation: Located on the RIGHT side of the main road when entering from Main Gate.

a_block.name: A-Block
a_block.description: Administrative hub hosting major seminar halls and high-level offices.
navigation: Located opposite the NTR Library on the LEFT side of the road.

h_block.name: H-Block
h_block.description: Engineering academic building hosting ECE and EEE departments.
navigation: Located further down the road after A-Block.

n_block.name: N-Block
n_block.description: Main academic building hosting technical competitions.
navigation: Tall building located after H-Block on the campus road.

u_block.name: U-Block
u_block.description: The red building hosting Mahotsav food stalls and pro shows.
navigation: Large RED building located after N-Block.

cricket_ground.name: Cricket Ground
cricket_ground.description: Large outdoor stadium used for athletics and football.

convocation_hall.name: Convocation Hall
convocation_hall.description: Indoor auditorium for inauguration and cultural events.
navigation: Located to the LEFT side of U-Block.

lara_gate.name: Vignan LARA Gate
navigation: Located at the far end of the campus road past U-Block.
